subject: Hatsune Miku, the virtual idol, in a dynamic stage pose with long twin-tails, wearing her signature outfit
description: A female-presenting figure with extremely long twin-tailed hair in a vivid teal color strikes a dynamic, expressive pose. She wears a dark top and a short skirt with accents, and her arms are extended outward in a performance gesture. The background features bold, stylized large text — a visual design motif — and the overall aesthetic is high-energy and stage-performance-oriented. The composition is tightly framed around the upper body and arms, with a sense of forward motion.
foreground: female-presenting figure with long teal twin-tails in performance pose
background: stylized large bold text overlay, stage-design aesthetic
